◎简　　介  

　　动画片《Wild Kratts动物兄弟》作为美国公共电视台PBS高收视率的节目，在3年的时间已经被翻译成了21种语言，且在超过181个国家中播出。2016年暑假正式登陆中国，给小朋友带来奇妙的野生动物世界大冒险！Chris and Martin Kratt are brothers who explore the wild throughout the world to learn more about animals and share conservation information. They have three friends who travel in the Tortuga HQ with them named Aviva, Koki and Jimmy Z. The brothers have creature power suit...
